controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (frauds classification and reporting by commercial banks and select fis) directions 2016
controls.control_description:
1.1.1 These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Frauds
classification and reporting by commercial banks and select FIs) directions
2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (frauds classification and reporting by commercial banks and select fis) directions 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect on the day they are placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india (rbi)
controls.control_description:
1.1.2 These directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on
the official website of the Reserve Bank of India (RBI).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect on the day they are placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india (rbi)

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to scheduled commercial banks (excluding rrbs) and select fis operating in india
controls.control_description:
1.2 Applicability
The provisions of these Directions shall apply to scheduled commercial banks
(excluding RRBs) and select FIs operating in India
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to scheduled commercial banks (excluding rrbs) and select fis operating in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be introduced and caution exercised while dealing with such parties by banks
controls.control_description:
These directions also aim to enable faster dissemination of
information by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) to banks on the details of
frauds, unscrupulous borrowers and related parties, based on banks'
reporting so that necessary safeguards / preventive measures by way of
appropriate procedures and internal checks may be introduced and caution
exercised while dealing with such parties by banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be introduced and caution exercised while dealing with such parties by banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide focus on the "fraud prevention and management function" to enable, among others, effective investigation of fraud cases and prompt as well as
controls.control_description:
2.1.1 The Chairmen and Managing Directors/Chief Executive Officers
(CMD/CEOs) of banks must provide focus on the "Fraud Prevention and
Management Function" to enable, among others, effective investigation of
fraud cases and prompt as well as accurate reporting to appropriate
regulatory and law enforcement authorities including Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide focus on the "fraud prevention and management function" to enable, among others, effective investigation of fraud cases and prompt as well as

controls.control_objective: To ensure be owned by the bank's ceo, audit committee of the board and the special committee of the board
controls.control_description:
2.1.2 The fraud risk management, fraud monitoring and fraud investigation
function must be owned by the bank's CEO, Audit Committee of the Board
and the Special Committee of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be owned by the bank's ceo, audit committee of the board and the special committee of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame internal policy for fraud risk management and fraud investigation function, based on the governance standards relating to the ownership of the f
controls.control_description:
2.1.3 Banks with the approval of their respective Boards, shall frame internal
policy for fraud risk management and fraud investigation function, based on
the governance standards relating to the ownership of the function and
accountability resting on defined and dedicated organizational set up and
operating processes.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame internal policy for fraud risk management and fraud investigation function, based on the governance standards relating to the ownership of the f

controls.control_objective: To ensure send the fraud monitoring returns1 (fmr) through the xbrl system, as detailed in para 3
controls.control_description:
2.1.4 Banks shall send the Fraud Monitoring Returns1 (FMR) through the
XBRL system, as detailed in para 3.2 below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to send the fraud monitoring returns1 (fmr) through the xbrl system, as detailed in para 3

controls.control_objective: To ensure specifically nominate an official of the rank of general manager who will be responsible for submitting all the returns referred to in this circular
controls.control_description:
Banks should specifically
nominate an official of the rank of General Manager who will be responsible
for submitting all the returns referred to in this circular.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specifically nominate an official of the rank of general manager who will be responsible for submitting all the returns referred to in this circular

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as fraud and reported accordingly: a
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the above, the following cases shall be
treated as fraud and reported accordingly:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as fraud and reported accordingly: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be submitted in cases where central investigating agencies have initiated criminal proceedings suo moto and/or where the reserve bank has directe
controls.control_description:
3.2.3 Fraud reports should also be submitted in cases where central
investigating agencies have initiated criminal proceedings suo moto and/or
where the Reserve Bank has directed that such cases be reported as frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be submitted in cases where central investigating agencies have initiated criminal proceedings suo moto and/or where the reserve bank has directe

controls.control_objective: To ensure also report frauds perpetrated in their subsidiaries and affiliates/joint ventures in fmr format in hard copy only
controls.control_description:
Banks may also report frauds perpetrated in their subsidiaries and
affiliates/joint ventures in FMR format in hard copy only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also report frauds perpetrated in their subsidiaries and affiliates/joint ventures in fmr format in hard copy only

controls.control_objective: To ensure report all frauds perpetrated at such branches/offices also to rbi
controls.control_description:
3.2.5 Banks (other than foreign banks) having overseas branches/offices
should report all frauds perpetrated at such branches/offices also to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report all frauds perpetrated at such branches/offices also to rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure to furnish a flash report (fr) for frauds involving amounts of ₹50 million and above within a week of such frauds coming to the notice of the bank's h
controls.control_description:
3.2.6 In addition to the FMR, banks are required to furnish a Flash Report
(FR) for frauds involving amounts of ₹50 million and above within a week of
such frauds coming to the notice of the bank's head office.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to furnish a flash report (fr) for frauds involving amounts of ₹50 million and above within a week of such frauds coming to the notice of the bank's h

controls.control_objective: To ensure include amount involved, nature of fraud, modus operandi in brief, name of the branch/ office, names of parties involved, their constitution, names of
controls.control_description:
The FR,
inter alia, should include amount involved, nature of fraud, modus operandi in
brief, name of the branch/ office, names of parties involved, their constitution,
names of proprietors / partners and directors, names of officials involved and
lodging of complaint with police/CBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include amount involved, nature of fraud, modus operandi in brief, name of the branch/ office, names of parties involved, their constitution, names of

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the data furnished are complete/accurate and up-to-date
controls.control_description:
As the complete particulars on frauds
perpetrated in the banks are vital for monitoring and supervisory purposes
and dissemination of information through Caution Advice / Central Fraud
Registry (CFR), banks should ensure that the data furnished are
complete/accurate and up-to-date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the data furnished are complete/accurate and up-to-date

controls.control_objective: To ensure indicate as "no particulars to be reported" or "details not available at present" etc
controls.control_description:
Incidentally, if no data is to be provided in
respect of any of the items, or if details of any of the items are not available at
the time of reporting of FMR return, the bank may indicate as "no particulars
to be reported" or "details not available at present" etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to indicate as "no particulars to be reported" or "details not available at present" etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish to department of banking supervision, central fraud monitoring cell, bengaluru any changes in the names of officials that will be necessary fo
controls.control_description:
All banks/Financial Institutions should furnish to Department of Banking
Supervision, Central Fraud Monitoring Cell, Bengaluru any changes in the
names of officials that will be necessary for inclusion in the Record.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish to department of banking supervision, central fraud monitoring cell, bengaluru any changes in the names of officials that will be necessary fo

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the reporting system is suitably streamlined so that delays in reporting of frauds, submission of delayed and incomplete fraud reports are
controls.control_description:
3.3.1 Banks should ensure that the reporting system is suitably streamlined so
that delays in reporting of frauds, submission of delayed and incomplete fraud
reports are avoided.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the reporting system is suitably streamlined so that delays in reporting of frauds, submission of delayed and incomplete fraud reports are

controls.control_objective: To ensure fix staff accountability in respect of delays in reporting fraud cases to rbi
controls.control_description:
Banks must fix staff accountability in respect of delays in
reporting fraud cases to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fix staff accountability in respect of delays in reporting fraud cases to rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure therefore, strictly adhere to the timeframe fixed in this circular for reporting of fraud cases to rbi failing which they would be liable for penal ac
controls.control_description:
Banks should therefore, strictly adhere
to the timeframe fixed in this circular for reporting of fraud cases to RBI failing
which they would be liable for penal action prescribed under Section 47(A) of
the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to therefore, strictly adhere to the timeframe fixed in this circular for reporting of fraud cases to rbi failing which they would be liable for penal ac

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all frauds of ₹0
controls.control_description:
4.1 Reports to the Board
Banks should ensure that all frauds of ₹0.1 million and above are reported to
their Boards promptly on their detection.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all frauds of ₹0

controls.control_objective: To ensure , among other things, take note of the failure on the part of the concerned branch officials and controlling authorities, and give details of action i
controls.control_description:
Such reports should, among other
things, take note of the failure on the part of the concerned branch officials
and controlling authorities, and give details of action initiated against the
officials responsible for the fraud.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , among other things, take note of the failure on the part of the concerned branch officials and controlling authorities, and give details of action i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed before the audit committee of the board of directors during the month following the quarter to which it pertains
controls.control_description:
4.2.1 Information relating to frauds for the quarters ending June, September
and December shall be placed before the Audit Committee of the Board of
Directors during the month following the quarter to which it pertains.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed before the audit committee of the board of directors during the month following the quarter to which it pertains

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accompanied by supplementary material analysing statistical information and details of each fraud so that the audit committee of the board would ha
controls.control_description:
4.2.2 These should be accompanied by supplementary material analysing
statistical information and details of each fraud so that the Audit Committee of
the Board would have adequate material to contribute effectively in regard to
the punitive or preventive aspects of frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accompanied by supplementary material analysing statistical information and details of each fraud so that the audit committee of the board would ha

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct an annual review of the frauds and place a note before the board of directors/local advisory board for information
controls.control_description:
4.3.1 Banks should conduct an annual review of the frauds and place a note
before the Board of Directors/Local Advisory Board for information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct an annual review of the frauds and place a note before the board of directors/local advisory board for information

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put up to the board before the end of the next quarter i
controls.control_description:
The
reviews for the year-ended March shall be put up to the Board before the end
of the next quarter i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put up to the board before the end of the next quarter i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be preserved for verification by the reserve bank's inspecting officers
controls.control_description:
Such reviews need not be
sent to RBI but may be preserved for verification by the Reserve Bank's
inspecting officers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be preserved for verification by the reserve bank's inspecting officers

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, include the following:
controls.control_description:
4.3.2 The main aspects to be taken into account while making such a review
shall, inter alia, include the following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, include the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, for investigation, as per the guidelines issued in this regard to public sector banks by government of india
controls.control_description:
(e) Whether frauds are reported to local Police or CBI, as the case may
be, for investigation, as per the guidelines issued in this regard to
public sector banks by Government of India.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be, for investigation, as per the guidelines issued in this regard to public sector banks by government of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure also, among other things, include the following details:
controls.control_description:
4.3.3 The annual reviews should also, among other things, include the
following details:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also, among other things, include the following details:

controls.control_objective: To ensure place the copy of the circular on modus-operandi of fraud issued by them for alerting their branches/controlling offices etc
controls.control_description:
4.3.4 Banks shall place the copy of the circular on modus-operandi of fraud
issued by them for alerting their branches/controlling offices etc., on specific
frauds before the Audit Committee of Board (ACB) in its periodical meetings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to place the copy of the circular on modus-operandi of fraud issued by them for alerting their branches/controlling offices etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor all the cases of frauds in general, banks are required to constitute a special committee of the board for monitoring and follow up of cases of
controls.control_description:
4.4.1 While Audit Committee of the Board (ACB) shall monitor all the cases of
frauds in general, banks are required to constitute a Special Committee of the
Board for monitoring and follow up of cases of frauds (SCBF) involving
amounts of ₹10 million and above exclusively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor all the cases of frauds in general, banks are required to constitute a special committee of the board for monitoring and follow up of cases of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be decided according to the number of cases involved
controls.control_description:
The periodicity of the meetings of the Special
Committee may be decided according to the number of cases involved.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be decided according to the number of cases involved

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet and review as and when a fraud involving an amount of ₹10 million and above comes to light
controls.control_description:
In
addition, the Committee should meet and review as and when a fraud
involving an amount of ₹10 million and above comes to light.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet and review as and when a fraud involving an amount of ₹10 million and above comes to light

controls.control_objective: To ensure delineate in a policy document the processes for implementation of the committee's directions and enable a dedicated outfit of the bank to implement t
controls.control_description:
4.4.3 The banks shall delineate in a policy document the processes for
implementation of the Committee's directions and enable a dedicated outfit of
the bank to implement the directions in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to delineate in a policy document the processes for implementation of the committee's directions and enable a dedicated outfit of the bank to implement t

controls.control_objective: To ensure 26, 2011 to address all issues arising out of lapses in the functioning of the private sector and foreign banks especially relating to corruption, mal
controls.control_description:
The detailed guidelines for private sector and foreign banks were issued on
May 26, 2011 to address all issues arising out of lapses in the functioning of
the private sector and foreign banks especially relating to corruption,
malpractices, frauds etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 26, 2011 to address all issues arising out of lapses in the functioning of the private sector and foreign banks especially relating to corruption, mal

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to place the report on individual cases of attempted fraud involving an amount of ₹10 million and above before the audit committee of its boa
controls.control_description:
However, banks should continue to place the
report on individual cases of attempted fraud involving an amount of ₹10
million and above before the Audit Committee of its Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to continue to place the report on individual cases of attempted fraud involving an amount of ₹10 million and above before the audit committee of its boa

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the following viz
controls.control_description:
The report should
cover the following viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the following viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put up to the acb within three months of the end of the relative year
controls.control_description:
as on March 31 every year should
be put up to the ACB within three months of the end of the relative year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put up to the acb within three months of the end of the relative year

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to cfmc, rbi and the ssm (senior supervisory manager) of rbi, the details of fraud cases of ₹0
controls.control_description:
5.1 Banks shall report to CFMC, RBI and the SSM (Senior Supervisory
Manager) of RBI, the details of fraud cases of ₹0.1 million and above closed
along with reasons for the closure after completing the process as given
below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report to cfmc, rbi and the ssm (senior supervisory manager) of rbi, the details of fraud cases of ₹0

controls.control_objective: To ensure - close only such cases where the actions as stated below are complete and prior approval is obtained from the ssm
controls.control_description:
5.2 Banks should - close only such cases where the actions as stated
below are complete and prior approval is obtained from the SSM.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to - close only such cases where the actions as stated below are complete and prior approval is obtained from the ssm

controls.control_objective: To ensure also pursue vigorously with cbi for final disposal of pending fraud cases especially where the banks have completed staff side action
controls.control_description:
5.3 Banks should also pursue vigorously with CBI for final disposal of
pending fraud cases especially where the banks have completed staff side
action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also pursue vigorously with cbi for final disposal of pending fraud cases especially where the banks have completed staff side action

controls.control_objective: To ensure vigorously follow up with the police authorities and/or court for final disposal of fraud cases
controls.control_description:
Similarly, banks may vigorously follow up with the police authorities
and/or court for final disposal of fraud cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to vigorously follow up with the police authorities and/or court for final disposal of fraud cases

controls.control_objective: To ensure to follow the guidelines relating to seeking prior approval for closure of such cases from the ssm and follow up of such cases after closure as mentio
controls.control_description:
5.5 The banks are required to follow the guidelines relating to seeking prior
approval for closure of such cases from the SSM and follow up of such cases
after closure as mentioned below.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to to follow the guidelines relating to seeking prior approval for closure of such cases from the ssm and follow up of such cases after closure as mentio

controls.control_objective: To ensure have to submit their proposals, case wise, for closure to the ssm of the bank
controls.control_description:
5.6 The banks shall have to submit their proposals, case wise, for closure
to the SSM of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to have to submit their proposals, case wise, for closure to the ssm of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be closed after getting the approval of the ssm
controls.control_description:
The cases may be closed after getting the approval of
the SSM.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be closed after getting the approval of the ssm

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain the record of details of such cases in a separate ledger
controls.control_description:
The banks should maintain the record of details of such cases in a
separate ledger.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain the record of details of such cases in a separate ledger

controls.control_objective: To ensure vigorously follow up with the investigating agencies (cbi / police) to ensure that the investigation process is taken to its logical conclusion
controls.control_description:
Even after closure of the fraud cases for limited statistical
purposes, banks should vigorously follow up with the investigating agencies
(CBI / Police) to ensure that the investigation process is taken to its logical
conclusion.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to vigorously follow up with the investigating agencies (cbi / police) to ensure that the investigation process is taken to its logical conclusion

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to ensure that they are regularly and appropriately represented in the court proceedings as and when required
controls.control_description:
Similarly, the banks should continue to ensure that they are
regularly and appropriately represented in the court proceedings as and when
required.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to ensure that they are regularly and appropriately represented in the court proceedings as and when required

controls.control_objective: To ensure be preserved till the cases are finally disposed of by cbi / police or courts, as the case may be
controls.control_description:
All the relevant records pertaining to such cases must be preserved
till the cases are finally disposed of by CBI / Police or Courts, as the case may
be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be preserved till the cases are finally disposed of by cbi / police or courts, as the case may be

controls.control_objective: To ensure , with the approval of their respective boards, frame their own internal policy for closure of fraud cases, incorporating the above norms and other in
controls.control_description:
5.7 The banks shall, with the approval of their respective Boards, frame
their own internal policy for closure of fraud cases, incorporating the above
norms and other internal procedures / controls as deemed necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , with the approval of their respective boards, frame their own internal policy for closure of fraud cases, incorporating the above norms and other in

controls.control_objective: To ensure close cases of fraud even when police / cbi investigation is in progress or cases are pending in the court of law, they should complete, within the pr
controls.control_description:
5.8 Notwithstanding the fact that banks may close cases of fraud even
when Police / CBI investigation is in progress or cases are pending in the
court of law, they should complete, within the prescribed time frame, the
process of examination of staff accountability or conclude staff side actions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to close cases of fraud even when police / cbi investigation is in progress or cases are pending in the court of law, they should complete, within the pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure merely be actuated by the necessity of recovering expeditiously the amount involved, but should also be motivated by public interest and the need for
controls.control_description:
6.1 In dealing with cases of fraud/embezzlement, banks should not merely be
actuated by the necessity of recovering expeditiously the amount involved, but
should also be motivated by public interest and the need for ensuring that the
guilty persons do not go unpunished.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to merely be actuated by the necessity of recovering expeditiously the amount involved, but should also be motivated by public interest and the need for

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred to the regional head of the bank, who would scrutinize each case and direct the bank branch concerned on whether it should be reported to
controls.control_description:
6.2 All fraud cases of value below ₹10,000/- involving bank officials, should be
referred to the Regional Head of the bank, who would scrutinize each case and
direct the bank branch concerned on whether it should be reported to the local police
station for further legal action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred to the regional head of the bank, who would scrutinize each case and direct the bank branch concerned on whether it should be reported to

controls.control_description:
Banks
were also given an illustrative list of some of the preventive measures they
may follow in this regard viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow in this regard viz

controls.control_description:
Banks shall reduce or increase the threshold limits mentioned above with the
approval of the Board depending on the volume of cheques handled by the
bank or it's risk appetite.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to reduce or increase the threshold limits mentioned above with the approval of the board depending on the volume of cheques handled by the bank or it's

controls.control_objective: To ensure also consider the following preventive measures for dealing with suspicious or large value cheques (in relation to an account's normal level of operat
controls.control_description:
7.2 Banks may also consider the following preventive measures for dealing
with suspicious or large value cheques (in relation to an account's normal
level of operations):
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also consider the following preventive measures for dealing with suspicious or large value cheques (in relation to an account's normal level of operat

controls.control_objective: To ensure be resorted to selectively if not found feasible to be implemented systematically
controls.control_description:
The above may be resorted to selectively if not found feasible to be
implemented systematically.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be resorted to selectively if not found feasible to be implemented systematically

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately hand over the underlying instrument to drawee/paying bank as and when demanded to enable it to file an fir with the police authorities and
controls.control_description:
In such cases the presenting bank shall
immediately hand over the underlying instrument to drawee/paying bank as
and when demanded to enable it to file an FIR with the police authorities and
report the fraud to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to immediately hand over the underlying instrument to drawee/paying bank as and when demanded to enable it to file an fir with the police authorities and

controls.control_objective: To ensure file both the fraud report with the rbi and complaint with the police
controls.control_description:
7.5 However, in the case of collection of an instrument which is genuine but
the amount is collected fraudulently by a person who is not the true owner or
where the amount has been credited before realisation and subsequently the
instrument is found to be fake/forged and returned by the paying bank, the
collecting bank, which is defrauded or is at loss by paying the amount before
realisation of the instrument, shall file both the fraud report with the RBI and
complaint with the police.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to file both the fraud report with the rbi and complaint with the police

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the fraud to its head office
controls.control_description:
7.6 In case of collection of altered/fake cheque involving two or more
branches of the same bank, the branch where the altered/fake cheque has
been encashed, should report the fraud to its Head Office.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the fraud to its head office

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the fraud to the head office
controls.control_description:
Similarly in the
event of an altered/fake cheque having been paid / encashed involving two or
more branches of a bank under Core Banking Solution (CBS), the branch
which has released the payment should report the fraud to the Head Office.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the fraud to the head office

controls.control_objective: To ensure 7, 2015
controls.control_description:
Loan Frauds - New Framework
Based on the recommendations of an Internal Working Group constituted by
the Bank , a framework for dealing with loan frauds was put in place vide
circular DBS.CO.CFMC.BC.No.007/23.04.001/2014-15 dated May 7, 2015.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 7, 2015

controls.control_objective: To ensure entail
controls.control_description:
The early
detection of Fraud and the necessary corrective action are important to
reduce the quantum of loss which the continuance of the Fraud may entail.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to entail

controls.control_objective: To ensure ultimately turn out to be fraudulent
controls.control_description:
These signals in a loan account should immediately put the bank on
alert regarding a weakness or wrong doing which may ultimately turn out to be
fraudulent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ultimately turn out to be fraudulent

controls.control_objective: To ensure instead use them as a trigger to launch a detailed investigation into a rfa
controls.control_description:
A bank cannot afford to ignore such EWS but must instead use
them as a trigger to launch a detailed investigation into a RFA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to instead use them as a trigger to launch a detailed investigation into a rfa

controls.control_objective: To ensure choose to adopt or adapt the relevant signals from this list and also include other alerts/signals based on their experience, client profile and busin
controls.control_description:
Banks may choose to adopt or adapt the relevant
signals from this list and also include other alerts/signals based on their
experience, client profile and business models.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to choose to adopt or adapt the relevant signals from this list and also include other alerts/signals based on their experience, client profile and busin

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be reported on the crilc data platform together with the dates on which the accounts were classified as such
controls.control_description:
All accounts beyond ₹500 million
classified as RFA or 'Frauds' must also be reported on the CRILC data
platform together with the dates on which the accounts were classified as
such.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be reported on the crilc data platform together with the dates on which the accounts were classified as such

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to report all identified accounts to cfmc, rbi as per the existing cut-offs
controls.control_description:
However, banks shall continue to
report all identified accounts to CFMC, RBI as per the existing cut-offs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to continue to report all identified accounts to cfmc, rbi as per the existing cut-offs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be seen as an additional task but must be integrated with the credit monitoring process in the bank so that it becomes a continuous activity and also
controls.control_description:
8.3.5 The tracking of EWS in loan accounts should not be seen as an
additional task but must be integrated with the credit monitoring process in the
bank so that it becomes a continuous activity and also acts as a trigger for
any possible credit impairment in the loan accounts, given the interplay
between credit risks and fraud risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be seen as an additional task but must be integrated with the credit monitoring process in the bank so that it becomes a continuous activity and also

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sensitised to observe and report any manifestation of the ews promptly to the fraud monitoring group (fmg) or any other group constituted by the ba
controls.control_description:
The officer
responsible for the operations in the account, by whatever designation called,
should be sensitised to observe and report any manifestation of the EWS
promptly to the Fraud Monitoring Group (FMG) or any other group constituted
by the bank for the purpose immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be sensitised to observe and report any manifestation of the ews promptly to the fraud monitoring group (fmg) or any other group constituted by the ba

controls.control_objective: To ensure be held responsible for non-reporting or delays in reporting
controls.control_description:
To ensure that the exercise remains
meaningful, such officers may be held responsible for non-reporting or delays
in reporting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be held responsible for non-reporting or delays in reporting

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify the account as rfa and the details of rfa accounts shall be put up to the cmd/ceo every month
controls.control_description:
8.3.6 The FMG or any such designated committee shall classify the account
as RFA and the details of RFA accounts shall be put up to the CMD/CEO
every month.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify the account as rfa and the details of rfa accounts shall be put up to the cmd/ceo every month

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put up to the special committee of the board for monitoring and follow-up of frauds (scbf) providing, inter alia, a synopsis of the remedial action
controls.control_description:
8.3.7 A report on the RFA accounts shall be put up to the Special Committee
of the Board for monitoring and follow-up of Frauds (SCBF) providing, inter
alia, a synopsis of the remedial action taken together with their current status.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put up to the special committee of the board for monitoring and follow-up of frauds (scbf) providing, inter alia, a synopsis of the remedial action

controls.control_objective: To ensure result in similar frauds being perpetrated elsewhere
controls.control_description:
Among other things, delays in reporting of frauds also delays
the alerting of other banks about the modus operandi through Caution Advice
/ CFR by RBI that may result in similar frauds being perpetrated elsewhere.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to result in similar frauds being perpetrated elsewhere

controls.control_objective: To ensure have escaped attention at the appraisal stage can often be mitigated in case the post disbursement monitoring remains effective
controls.control_description:
Any weakness that
may have escaped attention at the appraisal stage can often be mitigated in
case the post disbursement monitoring remains effective.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have escaped attention at the appraisal stage can often be mitigated in case the post disbursement monitoring remains effective

controls.control_objective: To ensure consist of the risk management group (rmg) or any other appropriate group of the bank collecting independent information and market intelligence on the potential borrowers from the public domain on their track record, involvement in legal disputes, raids conducted on their businesses
controls.control_description:
In order to
strengthen the monitoring processes, based on an analysis of the collective
experience of the banks, inclusion of the following checks / investigations
during the different stages of the loan life-cycle should be carried out:
a) Pre-sanction: As part of the credit process, the checks being applied
during the stage of pre-sanction may consist of the Risk Management
Group (RMG) or any other appropriate group of the bank collecting
independent information and market intelligence on the potential
borrowers from the public domain on their track record, involvement in
legal disputes, raids conducted on their businesses, if any, strictures
passed against them by Government agencies, validation of submitted
information/data from other sources like the ROC, gleaning from the
defaulters list of RBI/other Government agencies, etc., which could be
used as an input by the sanctioning authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consist of the risk management group (rmg) or any other appropriate group of the bank collecting independent information and market intelligence on the potential borrowers from the public domain on their track record, involvement in legal disputes, raids conducted on their businesses

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the record of such pre-sanction checks as part of the sanction documentation
controls.control_description:
Banks shall keep the
record of such pre-sanction checks as part of the sanction
documentation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep the record of such pre-sanction checks as part of the sanction documentation

controls.control_objective: To ensure among others, focus on the adherence to the terms and conditions of sanction, rationale for allowing dilution of these terms and conditions, level at
controls.control_description:
b) Disbursement: Checks by RMG during the disbursement stage, shall
among others, focus on the adherence to the terms and conditions of
sanction, rationale for allowing dilution of these terms and conditions,
level at which such dilutions were allowed, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to among others, focus on the adherence to the terms and conditions of sanction, rationale for allowing dilution of these terms and conditions, level at

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly conform to the broad framework laid down by the board in this regard
controls.control_description:
The dilutions should
strictly conform to the broad framework laid down by the Board in this
regard.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to strictly conform to the broad framework laid down by the board in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify certain terms and conditions as 'core' which should not be diluted
controls.control_description:
As a matter of good practice, the sanctioning authority may
specify certain terms and conditions as 'core' which should not be
diluted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify certain terms and conditions as 'core' which should not be diluted

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately flag the non-adherence of core stipulations to the sanctioning authority
controls.control_description:
The RMG may immediately flag the non-adherence of core
stipulations to the sanctioning authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately flag the non-adherence of core stipulations to the sanctioning authority

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be commented upon at the time of review
controls.control_description:
Among
other things, the aspects of diversion of funds in an account, adequacy
of stock vis-a-vis stock statements, stress in group accounts, etc., must
also be commented upon at the time of review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be commented upon at the time of review

controls.control_objective: To ensure have capability to track market developments relating to the major clients of the bank and provide inputs to the credit officers
controls.control_description:
Besides, the RMG
should have capability to track market developments relating to the
major clients of the bank and provide inputs to the credit officers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have capability to track market developments relating to the major clients of the bank and provide inputs to the credit officers

controls.control_objective: To ensure institute a scrutiny through the fmg
controls.control_description:
8.5 Staff empowerment
Employees should be encouraged to report fraudulent activity in an account,
along with the reasons in support of their views, to the appropriately
constituted authority, under the Whistle Blower Policy of the bank, who may
institute a scrutiny through the FMG.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to institute a scrutiny through the fmg

controls.control_objective: To ensure 'hear' the concerned employee in order to obtain necessary clarifications
controls.control_description:
The FMG may 'hear' the concerned
employee in order to obtain necessary clarifications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 'hear' the concerned employee in order to obtain necessary clarifications

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available to such employees under the whistle blower policy of the bank so that the fear of victimisation does not act as a deterrent
controls.control_description:
Protection should be
available to such employees under the whistle blower policy of the bank so
that the fear of victimisation does not act as a deterrent.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be available to such employees under the whistle blower policy of the bank so that the fear of victimisation does not act as a deterrent

controls.control_objective: To ensure come across instances where the transactions in the account or the documents point to the possibility of fraudulent transactions in the account
controls.control_description:
8.6 Role of Auditors
During the course of the audit, auditors may come across instances where the
transactions in the account or the documents point to the possibility of
fraudulent transactions in the account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come across instances where the transactions in the account or the documents point to the possibility of fraudulent transactions in the account

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately bring it to the notice of the top management and if necessary to the audit committee of the board (acb) for appropriate action
controls.control_description:
In such a situation, the auditor should
immediately bring it to the notice of the top management and if necessary to
the Audit Committee of the Board (ACB) for appropriate action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately bring it to the notice of the top management and if necessary to the audit committee of the board (acb) for appropriate action

controls.control_objective: To ensure to make provisions to the full extent immediately, irrespective of the value of security
controls.control_description:
8.7 Incentive for Prompt Reporting
In case of accounts classified as 'fraud', banks are required to make
provisions to the full extent immediately, irrespective of the value of security.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to make provisions to the full extent immediately, irrespective of the value of security

controls.control_objective: To ensure now do so over four quarters provided there is no delay in reporting (cf
controls.control_description:
However, in case a bank is unable to make the entire provision in one go, it
may now do so over four quarters provided there is no delay in reporting (cf.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to now do so over four quarters provided there is no delay in reporting (cf

controls.control_objective: To ensure to make the provision in one go in terms of the said circular
controls.control_description:
In case of delays, the banks
under Multiple Banking Arrangements (MBA) or member banks in the
consortium are required to make the provision in one go in terms of the said
circular.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to make the provision in one go in terms of the said circular

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as rfa or not
controls.control_description:
8.8.1 In cases where the bank is the sole lender, the FMG will take a call on
whether an account in which EWS are observed should be classified as RFA
or not.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as rfa or not

controls.control_objective: To ensure be completed as soon as possible and in any case within a month of the ews being noticed
controls.control_description:
This exercise should be completed as soon as possible and in any
case within a month of the EWS being noticed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be completed as soon as possible and in any case within a month of the ews being noticed

controls.control_objective: To ensure use external auditors, including forensic experts or an internal team for investigations before taking a final view on the rfa
controls.control_description:
8.8.2 The bank may use external auditors, including forensic experts or an
internal team for investigations before taking a final view on the RFA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use external auditors, including forensic experts or an internal team for investigations before taking a final view on the rfa

controls.control_objective: To ensure either lift the rfa status or classify the account as a fraud
controls.control_description:
At the
end of this time line, which cannot be more than six months, banks should
either lift the RFA status or classify the account as a fraud.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to either lift the rfa status or classify the account as a fraud

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put up to the scbf with the observations/decision of the fmg
controls.control_description:
8.8.3 A report on the RFA accounts should be put up to the SCBF with the
observations/decision of the FMG.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put up to the scbf with the observations/decision of the fmg

controls.control_objective: To ensure list the ews/ irregularities observed in the account and provide a synopsis of the investigations ordered / remedial action proposed by the fmg togeth
controls.control_description:
The report should list the EWS/
irregularities observed in the account and provide a synopsis of the
investigations ordered / remedial action proposed by the FMG together with
their current status.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to list the ews/ irregularities observed in the account and provide a synopsis of the investigations ordered / remedial action proposed by the fmg togeth

controls.control_objective: To ensure take co-ordinated action, based on commonly agreed strategy, for legal / criminal actions, follow up for recovery, exchange of details on modus operan
controls.control_description:
8.9.2 In view of this, all the banks which have financed a borrower under
'multiple banking' arrangement should take co-ordinated action, based on
commonly agreed strategy, for legal / criminal actions, follow up for recovery,
exchange of details on modus operandi, achieving consistency in data /
information on frauds reported to Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to take co-ordinated action, based on commonly agreed strategy, for legal / criminal actions, follow up for recovery, exchange of details on modus operan

controls.control_objective: To ensure to immediately share the details with all other banks in the multiple banking arrangements
controls.control_description:
Therefore, the bank
which detects a fraud is required to immediately share the details with all
other banks in the multiple banking arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to immediately share the details with all other banks in the multiple banking arrangements

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct their own due diligence before taking any credit exposure and also independently monitor the end use of funds rather than depend fully on the
controls.control_description:
8.9.3 In case of consortium arrangements, individual banks must conduct
their own due diligence before taking any credit exposure and also
independently monitor the end use of funds rather than depend fully on the
consortium leader.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct their own due diligence before taking any credit exposure and also independently monitor the end use of funds rather than depend fully on the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be worked out by the consortium and duly documented so that accountability can be fixed easily at a later stage
controls.control_description:
However, as regards monitoring of Escrow Accounts, the
details may be worked out by the consortium and duly documented so that
accountability can be fixed easily at a later stage.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be worked out by the consortium and duly documented so that accountability can be fixed easily at a later stage

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shared with other consortium / multiple banking lenders immediately as hitherto
controls.control_description:
Besides, any major
concerns from the fraud perspective noticed at the time of annual reviews or
through the tracking of early warning signals should be shared with other
consortium / multiple banking lenders immediately as hitherto.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shared with other consortium / multiple banking lenders immediately as hitherto

controls.control_objective: To ensure then report the fraud to rbi within 21 days of detection and also report the case to cbi/police, as is being done hitherto
controls.control_description:
In case it is decided at the individual
bank level to classify the account as fraud straightaway at this stage itself, the
bank shall then report the fraud to RBI within 21 days of detection and also
report the case to CBI/Police, as is being done hitherto.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to then report the fraud to rbi within 21 days of detection and also report the case to cbi/police, as is being done hitherto

controls.control_objective: To ensure be convened within 15 days of such a request being received
controls.control_description:
The
meeting of the JLF so requisitioned must be convened within 15 days of such
a request being received.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be convened within 15 days of such a request being received

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as a fraud
controls.control_description:
In case there is a broad agreement, the account
should be classified as a fraud;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as a fraud

controls.control_objective: To ensure be red flagged by all the banks and subjected to a forensic audit commissioned or initiated by the consortium leader or the largest lender under mba
controls.control_description:
else based on the majority rule of agreement
amongst banks with at least 60% share in the total lending, the account
should be red flagged by all the banks and subjected to a forensic audit
commissioned or initiated by the consortium leader or the largest lender under
MBA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be red flagged by all the banks and subjected to a forensic audit commissioned or initiated by the consortium leader or the largest lender under mba

controls.control_objective: To ensure share the costs and provide the necessary support for such an investigation
controls.control_description:
All banks, as part of the consortium or multiple banking arrangement,
shall share the costs and provide the necessary support for such an
investigation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to share the costs and provide the necessary support for such an investigation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be completed within a maximum period of three months from the date of the jlf meeting authorizing the audit
controls.control_description:
8.9.5 The forensic audit must be completed within a maximum period of
three months from the date of the JLF meeting authorizing the audit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be completed within a maximum period of three months from the date of the jlf meeting authorizing the audit

controls.control_objective: To ensure reconvene and decide on the status of the account, either by consensus or the majority rule as specified above
controls.control_description:
Within 15
days of the completion of the forensic audit, the JLF shall reconvene and
decide on the status of the account, either by consensus or the majority rule
as specified above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reconvene and decide on the status of the account, either by consensus or the majority rule as specified above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be changed to fraud in all banks and reported to rbi and on the crilc platform within a week of the said decision
controls.control_description:
In case the decision is to classify the account as a fraud,
the RFA status shall be changed to Fraud in all banks and reported to RBI
and on the CRILC platform within a week of the said decision.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be changed to fraud in all banks and reported to rbi and on the crilc platform within a week of the said decision

controls.control_objective: To ensure lodge a complaint with the cbi on behalf of all banks in the consortium/mba
controls.control_description:
Besides, within
30 days of the RBI reporting, the bank commissioning/ initiating the forensic
audit should lodge a complaint with the CBI on behalf of all banks in the
consortium/MBA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lodge a complaint with the cbi on behalf of all banks in the consortium/mba

controls.control_objective: To ensure be lodged with the cbi by the psu bank with the largest exposure to the account in the consortium/mba
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, if the bank initiating the forensic audit is a
private sector bank, the complaint shall be lodged with the CBI by the PSU
bank with the largest exposure to the account in the consortium/MBA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be lodged with the cbi by the psu bank with the largest exposure to the account in the consortium/mba

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to the police as per extant instructions
controls.control_description:
If there
is no PSU bank in the consortium / MBA or it is a solo bank lending by a
private sector bank/foreign bank, the private bank/foreign bank shall report to
the Police as per extant instructions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report to the police as per extant instructions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be noted that the overall time allowed for the entire exercise to be completed is six months from the date when the first member bank reported the acc
controls.control_description:
8.9.6 It may be noted that the overall time allowed for the entire exercise to
be completed is six months from the date when the first member bank
reported the account as RFA or Fraud on the CRILC platform.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be noted that the overall time allowed for the entire exercise to be completed is six months from the date when the first member bank reported the acc

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate and complete a staff accountability exercise within six months from the date of classification as a fraud
controls.control_description:
8.10.1 As in the case of accounts categorised as NPAs, banks must initiate
and complete a staff accountability exercise within six months from the date of
classification as a Fraud.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate and complete a staff accountability exercise within six months from the date of classification as a fraud

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be covered under this exercise
controls.control_description:
Wherever felt necessary or warranted, the role of
sanctioning official(s) may also be covered under this exercise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be covered under this exercise

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed before the scbf and intimated to the rbi through the fmr update application supplied to them
controls.control_description:
The
completion of the staff accountability exercise for frauds and the action taken
shall be placed before the SCBF and intimated to the RBI through the FMR
Update Application supplied to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed before the scbf and intimated to the rbi through the fmr update application supplied to them

controls.control_objective: To ensure bifurcate all fraud cases into vigilance and non-vigilance
controls.control_description: 8.10.2 Banks may bifurcate all fraud cases into vigilance and non-vigilance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bifurcate all fraud cases into vigilance and non-vigilance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred to the investigative authorities
controls.control_description: Only vigilance cases should be referred to the investigative authorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred to the investigative authorities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be investigated and dealt with at the bank level within a period of six months
controls.control_description:
Non-
vigilance cases may be investigated and dealt with at the bank level within a
period of six months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be investigated and dealt with at the bank level within a period of six months

controls.control_objective: To ensure strive to complete the staff accountability exercise within six months as clearing the air on the staff members concerned in a shorter time frame is a
controls.control_description:
It is emphasised that banks should strive to complete
the staff accountability exercise within six months as clearing the air on the
staff members concerned in a shorter time frame is appropriate and desirable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strive to complete the staff accountability exercise within six months as clearing the air on the staff members concerned in a shorter time frame is a

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate the process of fixing staff accountability
controls.control_description:
8.10.3 In cases involving very senior executives of the bank, the Board / ACB/
SCBF may initiate the process of fixing staff accountability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate the process of fixing staff accountability

controls.control_objective: To ensure be held up on account of the case being filed with law enforcement agencies
controls.control_description:
8.10.4 Staff accountability should not be held up on account of the case being
filed with law enforcement agencies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be held up on account of the case being filed with law enforcement agencies

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted simultaneously
controls.control_description:
Both the criminal and domestic enquiry
should be conducted simultaneously.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted simultaneously

controls.control_objective: To ensure to lodge the complaint with the law enforcement agencies immediately on detection of fraud
controls.control_description:
8.11.1 Banks are required to lodge the complaint with the law enforcement
agencies immediately on detection of fraud.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to lodge the complaint with the law enforcement agencies immediately on detection of fraud

controls.control_objective: To ensure result in the loss of relevant 'relied upon' documents, non- availability of witnesses, absconding of borrowers and also the money trail getting cold
controls.control_description:
There should ideally not be any
delay in filing of the complaints with the law enforcement agencies since
delays may result in the loss of relevant 'relied upon' documents, non-
availability of witnesses, absconding of borrowers and also the money trail
getting cold in addition to asset stripping by the fraudulent borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to result in the loss of relevant 'relied upon' documents, non- availability of witnesses, absconding of borrowers and also the money trail getting cold

controls.control_objective: To ensure be drafted properly and invariably be vetted by a legal officer
controls.control_description:
8.11.3 The complaint lodged by the bank with the law enforcement agencies
should be drafted properly and invariably be vetted by a legal officer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be drafted properly and invariably be vetted by a legal officer

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably classify such accounts as frauds and report the same to rbi
controls.control_description:
Since such grounds automatically constitute the
basis for classifying an account as a fraudulent one, banks should invariably
classify such accounts as frauds and report the same to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to invariably classify such accounts as frauds and report the same to rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made in the case of rfa or fraud accounts
controls.control_description:
8.12.2 No restructuring or grant of additional facilities may be made in the
case of RFA or fraud accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made in the case of rfa or fraud accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure take a view on restructuring of such accounts based on their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal action against the erstwhile
controls.control_description:
However, in cases of fraud/malfeasance
where the existing promoters are replaced by new promoters and the
borrower company is totally delinked from such erstwhile
promoters/management, banks and JLF may take a view on restructuring of
such accounts based on their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of
criminal action against the erstwhile promoters/management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take a view on restructuring of such accounts based on their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal action against the erstwhile

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow normal procedures and the processes followed should be suitably recorded
controls.control_description:
In this regard the banks should follow normal
procedures and the processes followed should be suitably recorded.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow normal procedures and the processes followed should be suitably recorded

controls.control_objective: To ensure subject the title deeds and other documents in respect of all credit exposures of `5 crore and above to periodic legal audit and re- verification of t
controls.control_description:
9.1.1 Banks should subject the title deeds and other documents in respect of
all credit exposures of `5 crore and above to periodic legal audit and re-
verification of title deeds with relevant authorities as part of regular audit
exercise till the loan stands fully repaid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to subject the title deeds and other documents in respect of all credit exposures of `5 crore and above to periodic legal audit and re- verification of t

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish a review note to their board / audit committee of the board at quarterly intervals on an ongoing basis giving therein the information in respe
controls.control_description:
9.1.2 Banks shall furnish a review note to their Board / Audit Committee of
the Board at quarterly intervals on an ongoing basis giving therein the
information in respect of such legal audits which should cover aspects, inter
alia, like number of loan accounts due for legal audit for the quarter, how
many accounts covered, list of deficiencies observed by the auditors, steps
taken to rectify the deficiencies, number of accounts in which the rectification
could not take place, course of action to safeguard the interest of bank in such
cases, action taken on issues pending from earlier quarters.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish a review note to their board / audit committee of the board at quarterly intervals on an ongoing basis giving therein the information in respe

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that while packaging and selling performing or non-performing assets, it is properly ascertained that the pool of assets being sold does not co
controls.control_description:
9.2.2 It is therefore advised that banks should ensure that while packaging
and selling performing or non-performing assets, it is properly ascertained that
the pool of assets being sold does not contain any loan originated fraudulently
or has been classified as fraud as on the date of sale.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that while packaging and selling performing or non-performing assets, it is properly ascertained that the pool of assets being sold does not co

controls.control_objective: To ensure arrange to report by fax / e-mail instances of bank robberies, dacoities, thefts and burglaries to the following authorities immediately on their occu
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to arrange to report by fax / e-mail instances of bank robberies, dacoities, thefts and burglaries to the following authorities immediately on their occu

controls.control_objective: To ensure include following details
controls.control_description: The report should include following details;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include following details

controls.control_objective: To ensure turn out to be fraudulent 1 a) default in undisputed payment to the statutory bodies as declared in the annual report
controls.control_description:
ANNEX -II
Early Warning Signals (EWS)
Some Early Warning Signals (EWS) which should alert the bank officials about
some wrongdoings in the loan accounts which may turn out to be fraudulent
1 a) Default in undisputed payment to the statutory bodies as declared in the
Annual report.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to turn out to be fraudulent 1 a) default in undisputed payment to the statutory bodies as declared in the annual report
